name: git-helper-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Sovereign AI tools for everyone.

tools.name: parse_diff
tools.description: Parse a unified diff and extract structured change information.

tools.name: generate_commit_message
tools.description: Generate a commit message from a diff. Styles: conventional, simple, detailed.

tools.name: analyze_branch
tools.description: Analyze git log output. Expects format: hash|author|date|message (one per line).

tools.name: changelog_generator
tools.description: Generate a changelog from git log. Expects: hash|author|date|message per line.
